content.problemStatement:
We are given an array Arr with N distinct coins and a target. We have an
    infinite supply of each coin denomination. We need to find the number of ways we sum up the coin values to give us
    the target.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer N, the number of distinct coins. The second line contains N space-separated integers representing the coin denominations. The third line contains an integer T, the target sum.
content.outputFormat: The total number of ways to sum up the coin values to give the target.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to store the number of ways to reach each sum from 0 to T using the given coins.
